description_long: This is a compact mechanical keyboard with a pastel color scheme, featuring keycaps in shades of mint green, cream, and soft pink. The keyboard has a low-profile rectangular chassis with a slightly raised back, and the keys are arranged in a standard staggered layout. The case appears to be made of plastic with a matte finish, and the keycaps are likely double-shot or dye-sublimated for durability. There is a visible USB port on the back edge, suggesting wired connectivity. The keyboard lacks a dedicated numpad, indicating a tenkeyless or 65% layout. The overall design is modern and visually appealing, suitable for desktop use in urban environments such as offices, cafes, or co-working spaces.
description: A compact pastel-colored mechanical keyboard with a matte plastic case and a tenkeyless or 65% layout, featuring mint, cream, and pink keycaps. It has a modern, low-profile design and a visible USB port for wired connectivity.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the keyboard, highlighting the pastel keycaps and the low-profile chassis.
description_view_1: Side view from the left, displaying the rows of keys and the slight incline from front to back.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the USB port and the back row of keys, with the pastel color scheme visible.
description_view_3: Side view from the right, emphasizing the staggered key layout and the colored modifier keys.
